_comment: David Hattenborg's locked voice. AI-created, NOT cloned. Recipe-based for portability (build plan Section 6): the recipe — not an account-bound asset — is what transfers to Fabio's Higgsfield account. Audition in Higgsfield Speak 2.0 (prompt-driven: tone/emotion/delivery come from how the prompt is written), then lock preset + exact delivery-prompt text + settings here.
_status: TO LOCK at build time (Section 11). All null fields must be filled before Phase 7 (Render).
register: British English, theatrical, dramatic, wise, warm, curious, optimistic — a storyteller, never a lecturer

portability_check.question: Are Higgsfield custom voices account-bound?
portability_check.note: Verify empirically (Section 11). Rely on the recipe regardless. ElevenLabs is the portable fallback if a fully ownable bespoke voice is ever wanted.
